patterns.comment: includes sub-keys: states, events, actions, projections, queries, relationships, sagas, resources, commit_envelopes
state: / events: / actions: / projections: / queries: / relationships: / listeners: / sagas: / resources: / commit_envelopes:
Field type: string | number | int | boolean | array | object | etc.
Event name (SCREAMING_SNAKE key under events:) with entity_expr
Rule phases: preflight / core / side_effects / side_effect
Mutation op inside mutations block: EVENT_NAME: { op: upsert|delete|replace }
upsert|delete|replace as values (projection mutations op field)
patterns.name: keyword.operator.mutation-op.causet

patterns.comment: SQL column types in fields block (TEXT, INTEGER, INT, BIGINT, DOUBLE, etc.)
aggregate op values (add|sub) inside compact inline form { op: add, by: N }
patterns.name: keyword.operator.aggregate-op.inline.causet

patterns.comment: sum: / count: aggregate keys inside aggregate: block (query aggregate functions)
Query where operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, nin, gte_window, like, ilike
Event/action names as standalone values (in lists, emit payload, etc.)
patterns.name: constant.other.event-name.causet

patterns.comment: Projection/query name references in values (from:, joins, source_events list, etc.)
patterns.name: entity.name.class.name-ref.causet

patterns.comment: All known DSL keys (fallback catch-all for any not matched above)
SQL column types — includes INT alias used in showcase
patterns.name: storage.type.sql.causet

patterns.comment: Mutation ops as values after op:
patterns.name: keyword.operator.mutation-op.causet

patterns.comment: found_item / items_copy and other op `as:` bound variables
Builtin functions: max, min, floor, size, sum, contains, map, concat, join, shard, coalesce, isnull, format_date, is_prev_day, hash, LOOKUP_FIELD
patterns.name: support.function.builtin.causet

embedded-expression.comment: Highlight expression syntax inside quoted strings
